name: Icon Request

---

## Icon Description

Describe the icon you'd like added.

## Icon Type

- [ ] Cisco brand icon
- [ ] General purpose icon (Phosphor-style)

## Use Case

Why do you need this icon? What will it be used for?

## Reference

<!-- Provide any of the following if available -->

### Visual Reference

<!-- Attach an image, screenshot, or link to similar icon -->

### Icon Name Suggestion

<!-- Suggested name for the icon, e.g., "icon-cloud" or "server" -->

## Priority

How important is this for your project?

- [ ] Critical - blocking my work
- [ ] High - needed soon
- [ ] Medium - would be nice to have
- [ ] Low - just a suggestion

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other details about the icon request -->

---

> **Note**: New icons added here will automatically propagate to downstream libraries ([cisco-icons-svelte](https://github.com/jorcleme/cisco-icons-svelte), [cisco-icons-react](https://github.com/jorcleme/cisco-icons-react)) on their next release.
